title: chore(deps): update dependency extract-text-webpack-plugin to v3
body:
This Pull Request updates dependency [extract-text-webpack-plugin](https://github.com/webpack-contrib/extract-text-webpack-plugin) from `v2.1.2` to `v3.0.2`


### Commits

<details>
<summary>webpack-contrib/extract-text-webpack-plugin</summary>

#### 3.0.2
-   [`cc3ba94`](https://github.com/webpack-contrib/extract-text-webpack-plugin/commit/cc3ba946ef4066264410737ce5bd43d0c7d724f1) chore(release): 3.0.2
-   [`d5a1de2`](https://github.com/webpack-contrib/extract-text-webpack-plugin/commit/d5a1de21a65532f66b05a1f6c2146574ce385567) fix: refer to the `entrypoint` instead of the first `module` (`module.identifier`)  (#​601)
-   [`5286ab2`](https://github.com/webpack-contrib/extract-text-webpack-plugin/commit/5286ab20ad83f6ade30192f939e0b42d3956d6f5) build(defaults): update to v1.6.0 (#​652)
#### 3.0.1
-   [`4cfde50`](https://github.com/webpack-contrib/extract-text-webpack-plugin/commit/4cfde50a137ef83a79935467962702a0121e6d88) chore(release): 3.0.1
-   [`8de6558`](https://github.com/webpack-contrib/extract-text-webpack-plugin/commit/8de6558e33487e7606e7cd7cb2adc2cccafef272) fix: get real path from `__filename` instead of `__dirname` (`NS`)
-   [`510704f`](https://github.com/webpack-contrib/extract-text-webpack-plugin/commit/510704ffc44d6bec5e97b5aeef160542abf30f12) fix(index): stricter check for `shouldExtract !== wasExtracted` (#​605)
-   [`6a660f3`](https://github.com/webpack-contrib/extract-text-webpack-plugin/commit/6a660f3dfb7fe3769d8debd0f940cb4d14747f7d) docs(README): update install instructions (#​570)
-   [`083a6c8`](https://github.com/webpack-contrib/extract-text-webpack-plugin/commit/083a6c87ae9192ca528097ce303d6752f21a7150) docs(README): add custom `[contenthash]` formats (#​566)
#### 3.0.0
-   [`d7a75fc`](https://github.com/webpack-contrib/extract-text-webpack-plugin/commit/d7a75fc41880a1909afa948995840643f55c1948) chore(release): 3.0.0
-   [`7ae32d9`](https://github.com/webpack-contrib/extract-text-webpack-plugin/commit/7ae32d9c560ef0a7dd584e3bf5991bacd5753093) refactor: Apply webpack-defaults & webpack 3.x support (#​540)

</details>
